stmt = text(
    "SELECT id, actor, action, created_at "
    "FROM audit_events "
    "WHERE actor = '" + actor + "' "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC "
    "LIMIT :lim"
)

res = await conn.execute(stmt, {"lim": limit})
fixes.replacement:
stmt = text(
    "SELECT id, actor, action, created_at "
    "FROM audit_events "
    "WHERE actor = :actor "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC "
    "LIMIT :lim"
)

res = await conn.execute(stmt, {"actor": actor, "lim": limit})
